name: gnome-shell-env

The stocks@infinicode.de extension runs on GNOME Shell 42.9, X11 session, Pop!_OS (Linux 7.0.11-76070011-generic).

- JS must use the legacy GJS format (`imports.gi`, `var` exports, `Me.imports.*`) — ES `import` declaratio…
